verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Caught again. Your faithless friend. Don't You ever tire of hearing What a fool I've been? Guess I should pray, but what can I say? Oh, it hurts to know the hundred times I've caused You pain. The "forgive me" sounds so empty When I never change. Yet You stay and say, "I love you still," Forgiving me time and time again.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It's Your stubborn love That never lets go of me. I don't understand how You can stay Perfect Love embracing the worst in me How I long for Your stubborn love.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Funny me. Just couldn't see Even long before I knew You, You were loving me. Sometimes I cry, You must cry, too, When You see the broken promises I've made to you. I keep saying that I trust You Though I seldom do. Yet You stay and say You love me still, Knowing some day I'll be like You.
